title: Counter with Redux
description: Wire a counter to Redux using combineReducers, a counterReducer, useSelector, and useDispatch.
checklist: Create counterReducer with INCREMENT and DECREMENT
Dispatch INCREMENT and DECREMENT with useDispatch

hints.guide: // guide hints: Import: import React from 'react';
// guide hints: Import: useSelector and useDispatch from react-redux
// guide hints: initialState { count: 0 }, reducer with INCREMENT / DECREMENT
// guide hints: useDispatch() for INCREMENT / DECREMENT
// guide hints: Render count with Increment / Decrement buttons
// guide hints: Export: export default CounterComponent;
